10#include "XCore.h"

12#include "llvm/Support/TargetRegistry.h"
13using namespace llvm;
14
15Target llvm::TheXCoreTarget;
16
17extern "C" void LLVMInitializeXCoreTargetInfo() {
18 RegisterTarget<Triple::xcore> X(TheXCoreTarget, "xcore", "XCore");
19}
